title: SOC Analyst
description: Monday.com is seeking a SOC (Security Operations Center) Analyst to protect our platform and customer data. You'll monitor security events, respond to incidents, and implement preventative measures across our infrastructure. Work onsite in NYC for a rapidly scaling SaaS company powering work management globally.
responsibilities: Monitor security alerts and investigate suspicious activities
Respond to and contain security incidents with proper escalation
Analyze logs and security events to identify potential threats
Implement security best practices and hardening measures
Document incident response procedures and maintain run books

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Cybersecurity, Computer Science, or related field
skills: SIEM platform experience (Splunk, ELK, or similar)

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
